mapper.select: SELECT b.*, p.pen_name as initial_pen_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals WHERE batch_id = b.id) as animal_count FROM batches b LEFT JOIN pens p ON b.initial_pen_id = p.id ORDER BY b.entry_date DESC
SELECT b.*, p.pen_name as initial_pen_name FROM batches b LEFT JOIN pens p ON b.initial_pen_id = p.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
SELECT b.*, p.pen_name as initial_pen_name FROM batches b LEFT JOIN pens p ON b.initial_pen_id = p.id WHERE b.batch_code = #{batchCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batches (batch_code, entry_date, breed, source, initial_pen_id, notes) VALUES (#{batchCode}, #{entryDate}, #{breed}, #{source}, #{initialPenId}, #{notes})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batches WHERE batch_code LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM batches b
(b.batch_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR b.breed LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR b.source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
